title: Sugar Cosmetics is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Sugar Cosmetics is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Sugar Cosmetics! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Sugar Cosmetics:
Sugar Cosmetics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sugar Cosmetics!
